creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 211260
core.txt.0 for bridge mode VirtualBox

When I run VirtualBox on FreeBSD 13-CURRENT and use bridged networking, I get this error:

panic: Assertion in_epoch(net_epoch_preempt) failed at /usr/src/sys/net/if_ethersubr.c:841

This happens on both Ethernet and Wi-Fi, but does not happen on 12.x or lower.
